primary_layout_generator.name: Stitch by Google
primary_layout_generator.auth: STITCH_API_KEY local or OAuth in MCP client

persistent_rules: Start every new front-end layout from Stitch before coding.
Use Figma for design inspection and handoff when a design file exists.
Never commit Stitch or Figma secrets.
Keep the Valley home screen modular and user-selectable.
Expose a universal module dock for all Valley modules.
